original_prompt: 给这个手串做一张淘宝主图，要求换一个深色背景，手串透明干净，主文案：透光如星 驱散浊气  副文案：平安顺遂 白水晶
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description] A high-end Taobao main product image featuring a [Subject Lock: clear quartz bead bracelet] composed of uniformly sized, perfectly spherical beads resting on a dark surface. The beads must appear ultra-transparent, clean, and glossy, with visible internal drilling channels and high light refraction properties. The background is a deep, dark obsidian or velvet texture to maximize the contrast with the crystal-clear beads, making them glow like stars in the night sky. Lighting is soft yet focused, creating sharp specular highlights on the spherical surfaces to emphasize their purity and clarity. 

[Text & UI Layout] Minimalist and elegant layout. The main headline "透光如星 驱散浊气" is placed in the upper center or upper left area, using a sophisticated, glowing serif font (like Songti). The subtitle "平安顺遂 白水晶" is placed directly below in a smaller, sans-serif font. The text color is white or light silver to stand out against the deep background.
layout_logic: 采用经典的‘中心聚焦’或‘黄金分割’构图。产品位于画面中心或略偏下方，占据视觉重心。深色背景（纯黑、深蓝或深灰）能最大程度衬托白水晶的通透感。文字应置于上方留白处，使用白色系字体以确保在深色底上的可读性，字体加一点外发光效果可以呼应‘透光如星’的概念。
